calculate_exploitability_score.description: Calculates exploitability score (0-100) based on CVSS v3 components with weighted formula

calculate_impact_score.description: Calculates impact score (0-100) based on CVSS v3 impact triad and scope

calculate_breach_method_likelihood.description: Calculates likelihood scores for each breach method based on vulnerability characteristics
parameters: p_has_known_exploit: BOOLEAN for known exploit existence
calculate_breach_method_likelihood.usage: CROSS JOIN LATERAL calculate_breach_method_likelihood(cve_id, exploitability, impact, has_exploit, has_patch, dwell_days, exposure) AS bml

calculate_time_weighted_stats.description: Calculates time-weighted statistics with exponential decay for Gamma distribution modeling
parameters: p_value: The value to weight (e.g., risk score)
calculate_time_weighted_stats.returns: TABLE with exp_factor, mu_hat, lambda_hat, n_hat

parse_cvss_v3_vector.description: Parses CVSS v3 vector string into individual component codes
parse_cvss_v3_vector.returns: TABLE with attack_vector, attack_complexity, privileges_required, user_interaction, scope, confidentiality, integrity, availability

refresh_vulnerability_analytics_views.description: Refreshes all materialized views in correct dependency order

calculate_asset_impact_class_score.description: Calculates impact score (0-100) based on asset impact_class enum from risk_impact_metadata table
calculate_asset_impact_class_score.returns: DECIMAL impact score (0-100) from metadata numeric_score

calculate_propagation_impact_score.description: Calculates impact score (0-100) based on asset propagation_class enum from risk_impact_metadata table
calculate_propagation_impact_score.returns: DECIMAL impact score (0-100) from metadata numeric_score

calculate_combined_asset_impact_score.description: Calculates combined asset impact score using both impact_class and propagation_class enums with weighted combination

calculate_asset_exposure_score.description: Calculates asset exposure score (0-100) based on propagation_class enum for breach method likelihood calculations
calculate_asset_exposure_score.returns: DECIMAL exposure score (0-100) from metadata numeric_score

enrich_vulnerability_instance_metadata.description: Enriches a vulnerability instance with metadata from enum tables. Only returns metadata for enum values that exist in the metadata tables. Returns NULL for fields where the enum value doesn't exist or wasn't provided.
enrich_vulnerability_instance_metadata.returns: TABLE with all enriched metadata fields (severity, state, CVSS components). Fields are NULL if enum value doesn't exist or wasn't provided.

calculate_base_risk_score.description: Calculates base vulnerability risk score from CVSS, exploitability, impact, severity, and state weights. Formula: (CVSS + Exploitability + Impact) / 3 * Severity Weight * State Weight
parameters: p_cvssv3_basescore: CVSS v3 base score (0-10 scale)
p_state_risk_score: State risk score from metadata (0-100)

calculate_comprehensive_risk_score.description: Calculates comprehensive risk score combining base risk with all multipliers (CISA exploit, time urgency, patch penalty, asset context). Final score is capped at 100.0
parameters: p_base_risk_score: Base risk score from calculate_base_risk_score (0-100)
p_cisa_multiplier: CISA exploit multiplier (default 1.0, typically 1.5 if CISA exploit exists)
p_time_urgency_factor: Time-based urgency factor (default 1.0, increases with dwell time)
p_patch_penalty: Patch availability penalty (default 1.0, typically 1.2 if patch available)
p_asset_context_multiplier: Asset context multiplier from calculate_asset_context_multiplier (default 0.0)
calculate_comprehensive_risk_score.returns: DECIMAL comprehensive risk score (0-100, capped at 100.0)

calculate_risk_category.description: Determines risk category (CRITICAL, HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW) from a risk score based on thresholds: >=90 CRITICAL, >=70 HIGH, >=40 MEDIUM, else LOW

calculate_asset_context_multiplier.description: Calculates asset context multiplier from asset impact components using weighted combination. Uses combined asset impact score from enum metadata if available, otherwise falls back to legacy asset_impact fields
parameters: p_combined_asset_impact_score: Combined asset impact score from calculate_combined_asset_impact_score (0-100)
p_asset_impact: Legacy asset impact score (0-100, used as fallback)
p_propagation_impact_score: Propagation impact score from calculate_propagation_impact_score (0-100)
p_propagation_impact: Legacy propagation impact score (0-100, used as fallback)
p_asset_exposure_score: Asset exposure score from calculate_asset_exposure_score (0-100)
calculate_asset_context_multiplier.returns: DECIMAL asset context multiplier (weighted combination of impact components)
